datapoints.name: iops

datapoints.description: Pool throughput in bytes per second
datapoints.name: throughput

description: Per-pool Portworx capacity, utilization, IOPS, and throughput via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Per-pool metrics from px_pool_stats_total_bytes, px_pool_stats_used_bytes, px_pool_stats_available_bytes, px_pool_stats_provisioned_bytes, px_pool_stats_iops, and px_pool_stats_throughput_bytes. Utilization computed as (used/total)*100. Instances grouped by node.
name: Portworx_Pool_Performance
